title: T-025 — UI: FA MRP tab + Procurement tab + Commercial tab + Planning tab (schema-driven shells)
prompt:
# T-025 — Remaining schema-driven dept tab shells (Planning/Commercial/MRP/Procurement)

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §5.4-§5.9 + UX fa_mrp_tab/fa_procurement_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx (fa_mrp_tab 746-786, fa_procurement_tab 789-820)

## Goal
Wire 4 schema-driven tab forms (Planning, Commercial, MRP, Procurement) using buildDeptZod and updateFaCell, mirroring corresponding prototypes; blocking rules enforced via Reference.DeptColumns.

## Implementation contract
Four 'use client' tab modules under _tabs/. Each invokes buildDeptZod for its dept; renders fields via shared SchemaDrivenForm component; respects blocking_rule (lock cells when rule false). Save calls updateFaCell per dirty field. Reuse SchemaDrivenForm primitive from packages/ui.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/planning-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/commercial-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/mrp-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/procurement-tab.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/schema-driven-form.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/__tests__/schema-driven-form.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the MRP tab renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:746-786 (fa_mrp_tab), then it has the same 13 MRP fields in DeptColumns display_order, locked cells use disabled shadcn Input, and uses shadcn Form+Input+Select primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given Procurement tab and price.blocking_rule='Core + Production done' is unmet, when rendered, then price input is disabled with tooltip explaining gate
3. Given user changes a Planning field, when saved, then updateFaCell is called with that single field and the DB row updates

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests covering MRP parity, Procurement price gating, Planning save
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test "planning|commercial|mrp|procurement"-tab && pnpm --filter ui test schema-driven-form'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass blocking_rule
- Do not duplicate field definitions (read DeptColumns)
- Do not skip per-tab parity checklist

pipeline_inputs.description: Four schema-driven dept tab shells (Planning/Commercial/MRP/Procurement) plus shared SchemaDrivenForm primitive.
pipeline_inputs.details: Each tab invokes buildDeptZod and renders fields via SchemaDrivenForm. Blocking rules lock cells with tooltip. Reference: fa_mrp_tab 746-786, fa_procurement_tab 789-820. Parity ACs assert structural + visual + interaction match for at least MRP and Procurement.
out_of_scope: Do not implement V04 D365 status badges (T-064)

Given Procurement tab and price.blocking_rule unmet, when rendered, then price input is disabled with tooltip explaining gate
Given user changes a Planning field, when saved, then updateFaCell is called and DB row updates

Run 'pnpm --filter web test planning-tab commercial-tab mrp-tab procurement-tab && pnpm --filter ui test schema-driven-form'
